reason: Successfully navigated to the agent, sent a math question "Hello! What is 2+2?", waited for response, and verified the agent responded with "4" within the 3-minute timeout.
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 - Page loaded successfully showing the Super Agent interface with sidebar containing three agents including "QA-20260408-004321-gcgp" with status "idle"
Clicked on agent "QA-20260408-004321-gcgp" in the sidebar - Agent detail page loaded successfully showing agent name, status "idle", and message input field
Verified agent status - Agent status is "idle" which satisfies the requirement of "running" or "idle"
Typed message "Hello! What is 2+2?" in the message input field - Message was successfully entered in the input field with data-testid="landing-message-input"
Clicked Send message button - Message was sent successfully, agent status changed to "working", session "Quick Math Question Session" was created, and activity indicator showed "Working..."
Waited up to 3 minutes for response - Agent responded within 2 seconds with the answer "4"

Verified response mentions "4" and took screenshot - Screenshot captured showing the complete conversation: user message "Hello! What is 2+2?" on the right side and agent response "4" displayed below it with "Worked for 2s" timestamp. Agent status returned to "idle" after processing.
